name: Pina Colada Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package White cake mix without pudding (18.5 oz)
recipeInstructions: Combine cake mix, 1 cup coconut, water, and egg whites; beat for 2 minutes at high speed of an electric mixer. Reduce speed to low; beat for 1 minute. Pour batter into a greased and floured 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan. Bake in preheated oven at 350 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in center comes out clean. Cool on wire rack for 10 minutes. Punch holes with wooden pick. Drizzle cream of coconut over warm cake. Allow cake to cool completely before removing from pan and placing on wire rack. Spread whipped topping evenly over top. Sprinkle remaining coconut on top. Refrigerate at least 4 hours before serving. Cut into squares.
